title: Overly Added
description: Overly Optimized for the OptiFine user.
body:
# Overly Added
OVAD is a modpack that is built on performance by Overly Optimized with extras that I think every user should need.

This is for public servers, and normal everyday use, with more QOL and overall helpful things that still make it legal to play on servers.

## Quality of Life at its finest 
This adds such features like OptiFine compatibility with resource packs, Zooming with Zoomify, making it the best OptiFine alternative in the sea of alternatives, with all of these, you can be confident you wont be missing much on a vanilla server, and you can brag to all your friends that play with OptiFine that you are getting at least double the frames with more features than them.

## High performance
With the backing of [Overly Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ovop) as the backbone of this modpack, the modpack can easily acheve over 1 thousand frames on most modern computer, with even more with Nvidia Turing or later GPUs (On certain older versions of the pack.)

## Cut the crap, what is new?
Making a pack like this is easy to compare, use [Overly Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ovop) to compare mod lists.

Compared to [Overly Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ovop), the performance dropoff is almost zero.

Sorry, your supposed to see a Bisect ad if your on the website, please turn off your adblock!
